reviews.review_msg: This course is not a good choice for an elective course. Take geo 111 instead. It is true that you have to write 2 essays which are 3 pages-single spaced each in 2 hours during the final :(

HE WAS SO EFFING HOT, like honestly i went to class to just look at him. I got an A- and i swear it was because when he talked and when he laughed it did something to my heart. He is a Polish beauty. Goooo Tomasz Majek! WE LOVE YOU <3

Don't take his course, unless you are very confident with your average. His assignments are really hard and some questions are not related to the lecture. He wants exact definitions from the book, which means you need to memorize a hundred definitions. So, make your choice.
That was my best elective course so far. Very interesting course
best professor ive ever had. he's so passionate and knowledgeable which makes lectures super engaging. love him

His first time teaching, and it was horrible. He doesn't use a mic, his voice puts me to sleep. Essays on the midterm & final are brutal. Your mark is made of the midterm, final, a map quiz (that is held 4 times a sem, but if you get below 15/20, your mark is cut in half), and a paper. His midterm was out of 25, and is EXTREMELY easy to fail.
she is very inspiring and kind, although the class average is low if you do the homework and study her materials you can get good grades.
